THEALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.title: Aqua Vitae
THEALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.description: Whenever you use a Potion, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.
THEALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.flavor: The water of life distilled to its purest form.
THEALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.title: Auric Seal
THEALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.flavor: Stamped with the mark of perfection.
THEALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.title: Cinnabar Shard
THEALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.description: [gold]Poison[/gold] is triggered against enemies [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
THEALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.flavor: A fragment of crimson ore, still pulsing with toxicity.
THEALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.title: Flux Stone
THEALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.description: Whenever a card is created in combat, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
THEALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.flavor: Catalyzes reactions both alchemical and arcane.
THEALCHEMIST-GILDED_FLASK.title: Gilded Flask
THEALCHEMIST-GILDED_FLASK.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Whenever you use a potion, heal [green]6[/green] HP and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]. Potions can be sold to the Merchant for [gold]Gold[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-GILDED_FLASK.flavor: An ornate vessel lined with gold leaf. Its contents rejuvenate body and spirit.
THEALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POUCH.title: Harvest Pouch
THEALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POUCH.description: At the start of each combat, procure a random potion. If your potion slots are full, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} instead.
THEALCHEMIST-HARVEST_POUCH.flavor: Always seems to have one more thing rattling around inside.
THEALCHEMIST-MIDAS_ROOT.title: Midas Root
THEALCHEMIST-MIDAS_ROOT.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Gold[/gold], heal [green]1[/green] HP for every [blue]15[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] gained.
THEALCHEMIST-MIDAS_ROOT.flavor: Everything it touches turns to gold — and gold, in turn, to vitality.
THEALCHEMIST-TARNISHED_FLASK.title: Tarnished Flask
THEALCHEMIST-TARNISHED_FLASK.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Whenever you use a Potion, heal [green]4[/green] HP. Potions can be sold to the Merchant for [gold]Gold[/gold]
THEALCHEMIST-TARNISHED_FLASK.flavor: A battered flask stained with years of use. It still carries the faintest warmth.
THEALCHEMIST-THERIAC_VIAL.title: Theriac Vial
THEALCHEMIST-THERIAC_VIAL.description: If you have [gold]Poison[/gold] at the end of combat, heal equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
THEALCHEMIST-THERIAC_VIAL.flavor: An ancient remedy — the poison becomes the cure.
